/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN DA: SFPD SGT, CHRISTOPHER SERVAT/EXHMA: 5 PAGE DOCUMENT OF TEXT MESSAGES/EXHMA: WHITE BINDER CONTAINING 98 PAGESOF GRAPHIC CONTENT/EXHMA: PHOTO OF 2 CELL PHONES WITH TEXT MESSAGES/WITEXCL/OURT KEEPS EXHIBITS #1, #2 AND #3/CONTD: 06-18-21 FOR THE CONTINUATION OFTHE PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

03/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: DEFENDANT ENTERS A LIMITED TIME WAIVER ANDSTIPULATES TO A NEW LAST DAYFOR PRELIMINARY HEARING,/LDPX: 07-02-21 (60TH)//EMMOD: THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT'S PRE TRIAL MONITORING PROGRAM TO REMOVE THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE WORN BY THE DEFENDANT FROM THE DATES OF 06-13-21 TO 06-15-21, THE DEFENDANT IS PERMITTED TO LEAVE THE SAN FRANCISCO BAY AREA TO TRAVEL TO THE SANTA CRUZ, CALIFORNIA AREA DURING THE PERIOD OF 06-13-21 TO 06-15-21 SO THAT THE DEFENDANT CAN PARTICIPATE IN AJOB INTERVIEW, THE COURT ALSO ORDERS THAT THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICEBE PLACEDBACK ON THE DEFENDANT BY THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 06-15-21,/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL:CLARIF OF ADDTL SEARCH RELEASE/LD 03-22-21 (30TH)/X:COURT ORDERS DEFENDANT WITH THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS:/WS/X:COURT FINDS THAT A 4 WAY SEARCHAS TO PERSON, PLACE, VEHICLE AND ELECTRONIC DEVICES IS WARRANTED AND/X:BAND ON SOCIAL APPS USED: WHAT'S UP AND MEET ME/X:COURT FINDS IT REASONABLEUNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES TO IMPOSE THE ABOVE CONDITIONS AND FEELS IT DOESN'TSTOP THE DEFENDANT FROM TALKING TO HIS COUNSEL/X:COURT WILL NOT REQUEST FOR DEFENDANT TO TURN OVER HIS LOG-IN OR  PASSWORD BUT AT THE REQUEST OF LAWOFFICERS, DEFENDANT MUST LOG-IN TO DEVICES AND ALLOW LAW OFFICERS TO SEARCH AND COPY THEM/X:DEFENSE'S REQUEST FOR A 30 DAY STAY TO LITIGATE THIS ISSUE IS DENIED BY THE COURT/X:DATE OF 03-22-21 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 03-22-21 (30TH)/X:THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 04-21-21/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THEDEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEFENDANT NOT TO LOITER AT SCHOOLS, PARKS OR CAMPS WHERE MINOR CHILDREN RESIDE/WS/CONTD: 03-22-21 FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/X:EST 1,5HRS/DOP/CONTD: 03-01-21 CLARIF OF ADDTL SEARCH RELEASE/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/CONTD:DISPO/DOP/X:ZOOM APPROVED,/
